beds.title: Music Bed — Mellow Latin Fitness Club Draft
beds.note: Phone-audible v3 preview: louder, more beat-forward mellow Latin-club fitness energy with an upscale Newport Beach feel. Original preview, not a direct artist imitation.

beds.title: Foley Bed — Deep Magnetic Recumbent Bike Whir
beds.note: Phone-audible v3 preview: deeper smooth electronic resistance whir with no percussive click. This is louder than final mix level so it can be judged on a phone.

beds.title: Combined Bed — Music Plus Recumbent Bike Foley
beds.note: Phone-audible v3 preview of the revised mellow Latin-club music plus deeper magnetic bike whir, before dialogue ducking or final polish.
